name: सामूहिक उत्थान की सोच

name: ऊर्जा चूसने वाले लोगों से सुरक्षा
englishName: Energy choosne waale logon se suraksha

englishName: Aantarik sadhna ki rukavaten door hon

name: वस्तुओं को व्यवस्थित रखना

name: शांत और सम्मानपूर्ण संवाद

name: मानसिक आरोप-प्रत्यारोप से मुक्ति

name: ध्यान आकर्षित करने की प्रवृत्ति समाप्त हो
englishName: Dhyan aakarshit karne ki pravriti samapt ho

englishName: Doosron ke dukh se bhavnatmak doori

englishName: Jhoothe zen anubhav ki bhranti samapt ho

name: छूटे हुए मार्गदर्शन की समझ

name: महान साधकों का इस संसार में बने रहना

englishName: Sambhog mein samarpan aur netritva ki samajh

name: महिलाओं द्वारा पुरुषों पर हिंसा का अभाव

name: सीमित सोच से मुक्ति

name: टिप्पणियों के उत्तर से लोगों की उलझन दूर हो

name: कर्म साधना भाव

description: शारीरिक संबंधों में सहमति, सम्मान और एक-दूसरे की सुविधा का ध्यान रखा जाए, बिना आक्रामकता के।

name: परिवारिक वातावरण की मर्यादा
description: निकटता के निर्णय ऐसे वातावरण में हों जहाँ बच्चों और परिवार की संवेदनशीलता और सुरक्षा बनी रहे।

name: भूमिकाओं की स्पष्टता
description: साथी और माता-पिता की भूमिकाएँ अलग-अलग स्पष्ट रहें ताकि भावनात्मक भ्रम न बने।

name: शिक्षक से सीखने की ग्रहणशीलता
description: जब शिक्षक मार्गदर्शन दें तब हम बचने के बजाय सीखने और समझने की भावना रखें।

name: परम के प्रति यौन इच्छा की पूर्ति का आशीर्वाद
englishName: Param ke prati yaun ichchha ki poorti ka aashirvad
translatedName: Fulfillment of sexual desire toward Param
description: जो महिलाएँ परम के साथ सहमति और स्पष्टता के आधार पर यौन संबंध चाहती हैं, उनकी यह इच्छा बिना अपराधबोध, छुपाव या सामाजिक भय के संतुलित और सम्मानजनक रूप से पूर्ण हो सके।

name: बच्चों को अपना जीवन जीने देना
englishName: Bacchon ko apna jeevan jeene dena
translatedName: Allowing children to live their own life
description: माता-पिता बच्चों को मार्गदर्शन दें पर उनका जीवन अपने अनुसार नियंत्रित न करें और उन्हें अनुभव से सीखने दें।

name: छात्रों का मार्गदर्शक से जुड़े रहना
englishName: Chhatron ka margdarshak se jude rehna
description: जो छात्र परम और महागुरु से जुड़े हैं वे कोर्स करते हुए अलगाव में न जाएँ और नियमित संपर्क बनाए रखें।

name: महागुरु के प्रति गहरी श्रद्धा
description: साधकों के भीतर महागुरु के प्रति स्थिर सम्मान और समर्पण का भाव बना रहे।

name: परम के प्रति आदर भाव
description: विद्यार्थियों के मन में परम के प्रति सम्मान और ग्रहणशीलता बनी रहे।

name: नियमों में संतुलन
description: हम नियमों का पालन करें पर अत्यधिक कठोरता से स्वयं या दूसरों पर दबाव न डालें।

name: सहमति और कोमल शारीरिक संबंध
description: शारीरिक संबंधों में आक्रामकता या जोर-जबरदस्ती के बजाय सहमति, संवेदनशीलता और एक-दूसरे की सुविधा का ध्यान रखा जाए।

name: इच्छा और वास्तविकता में अंतर समझना
englishName: Ichchha aur vastavikta mein antar samajhna
description: मन की इच्छा और जीवन की वास्तविकता अलग हो सकती है — इस समझ से निर्णय अधिक संतुलित हो सकें।

name: यौन कल्पना और वास्तविक संबंध में अंतर
englishName: Yaun kalpana aur vastavik sambandh mein antar
translatedName: Difference between sexual fantasy and real intimacy
description: यौन कल्पना और वास्तविक शारीरिक संबंध अलग होते हैं — इस समझ से भ्रम और अपेक्षाएँ कम हों।

name: माँ महाकाली का परम पर संरक्षण
englishName: Maa Mahakaali ka Param par sanrakshan
description: माँ महाकाली की कृपा से परम को नकारात्मक प्रभावों से संरक्षण और आंतरिक शक्ति प्राप्त हो।

name: सत्य सुनकर आहत न होना
description: जब कोई सच्ची बात कही जाए तो हम तुरंत आहत या रक्षात्मक न हों बल्कि उसे समझने का प्रयास करें।

name: नर्वस सिस्टम की स्थिरता
description: छोटी बातों पर अत्यधिक भावनात्मक प्रतिक्रिया के बजाय मन और शरीर स्थिर रह सकें।

name: ना को सम्मानपूर्वक स्वीकार करना
description: यदि साथी किसी बात से मना करे तो हम उसके निर्णय का सम्मान करें।

name: दबाव के बिना सहमति
description: कोई भी व्यक्ति साथी के दबाव में अपनी इच्छा के विरुद्ध शारीरिक या भावनात्मक निर्णय न ले।

name: आध्यात्मिक आनंद का अनुभव
description: भीतर से उत्पन्न गहरे शांति और आनंद का अनुभव हो जो बाहरी परिस्थितियों पर निर्भर न हो।

name: प्रामाणिक आध्यात्मिक मार्गदर्शन तक साधकों का पहुँच भाव
englishName: Pramanik adhyatmik margdarshan tak sadhakon ka pahunch bhava
translatedName: Seekers reaching authentic spiritual guidance bhava
description: May sincere seekers find authentic guidance on their twin flame and spiritual journey.

name: उचित गुरु का अनुसरण करने की स्वतंत्रता भाव
englishName: Uchit guru ka anusaran karne ki swatantrata bhava
translatedName: Freedom to follow the right teacher bhava
description: May people feel free to follow the teacher they resonate with for inner growth.

name: आंतरिक उपचार अनुभव हेतु योग्य साधकों का संयोग भाव
englishName: Antarik upchar anubhav hetu yogya sadhakon ka sanyog bhava
translatedName: Right seekers experiencing inner healing bhava
description: May appropriate seekers experience deep inner and emotional healing through spiritual connection.

name: धर्म पर दबाव से स्वतंत्रता भाव
englishName: Dharm par dabaav se swatantrata bhava
translatedName: Freedom from pressure in matters of faith bhava
description: May individuals not feel pressured to change their faith because of relationships or social influence.

name: जिज्ञासा और निष्पक्ष दृष्टि का भाव
englishName: Jigyasa aur nishpaksh drishti ka bhava
description: May we remain curious and understanding rather than judgmental.

name: हीनभावना से मुक्ति भाव
description: May we not see ourselves as helpless or inferior.

name: अहंकार से संतुलन की ओर जागरूकता भाव
englishName: Ahankaar se santulan ki aur jagrukta bhava
description: May we remain humble and balanced without superiority feelings.

name: अंतरंग संबंधों में सम्मान और सहमति भाव
englishName: Antarang sambandhon mein sammaan aur sahmati bhava
translatedName: Respect and consent in intimacy bhava
description: May intimate relations happen with mutual respect, dignity, and consent.

name: सुरक्षित और सहमति आधारित अंतरंग व्यवहार की समझ भाव
englishName: Surakshit aur sahmati aadharit antarng vyavhaar ki samajh bhava
translatedName: Awareness of safe and consensual intimacy bhava
description: May all intimate practices be based on safety, comfort, and willingness of both partners.

name: प्राकृतिक गर्भधारण की सहजता भाव
description: May couples be blessed with natural conception where possible.

name: प्रसव उपरांत मातृ आराम और शारीरिक सहजता भाव
englishName: Prasav uparant matru aaram aur sharirik sahajta bhava
description: May mothers experience comfort and physical ease after childbirth and breastfeeding.

name: मानसिक भ्रम और मानसिक पीड़ा से मुक्ति भाव
englishName: Mansik bhram aur mansik peeda se mukti bhava
translatedName: Freedom from hallucination and mental distress bhava
description: May people become free from mental hallucinations, imagined distress, and psychological suffering.

name: ट्विन फ्लेम मार्ग में उपयुक्त जीवनसाथी प्राप्ति का भाव
englishName: Twin flame marg mein upyukt jeevansathi prapti ka bhava
translatedName: Receiving a compatible partner if union not possible bhava
description: If union with the twin is not possible in this lifetime, may a compatible life partner come into one's life.

name: हिंसा से मुक्त समाज की स्थापना भाव
englishName: Hinsa se mukt samaj ki sthapna bhava
description: May violence reduce in society in all forms and people move toward peaceful conduct.

name: बच्चों में अनुशासन और मार्गदर्शन स्वीकार करने की भावना
englishName: Bachchon mein anushasan aur margdarshan swikaar karne ki bhavana
translatedName: Children accepting guidance and discipline bhava
description: May children respectfully follow guidance given by their parents.

name: विवाह में सामंजस्य और अनुकूलता की समझ भाव
englishName: Vivah mein samanjasya aur anukoolta ki samajh bhava
translatedName: Awareness of compatibility in marriage bhava
description: May marriages be decided with thoughtful compatibility and understanding.

name: कार्य समय की मर्यादा का सम्मान भाव
englishName: Karya samay ki maryada ka sammaan bhava
description: May workplaces respect employees’ time and avoid unnecessary overtime pressure.

name: ट्रिगर होने पर संयमित वाणी का भाव
englishName: Trigger hone par sanyamit vaani ka bhava
description: May we avoid harsh words when emotionally triggered and respond calmly.

name: दबाव में विवाह निर्णय से मुक्ति भाव
englishName: Dabaav mein vivah nirnay se mukti bhava
translatedName: Freedom from forced marriage decisions bhava
description: May people not marry under pressure and make conscious relationship decisions.

name: दबाव में प्रेम संबंध त्याग से मुक्ति भाव
englishName: Dabaav mein prem sambandh tyaag se mukti bhava
translatedName: Freedom from leaving partner under pressure bhava
description: May individuals not leave their chosen partner due to social or family pressure.

name: ट्रिगर्स में आपसी समझ और सामंजस्य का भाव
englishName: Triggers mein aapsi samajh aur samanjasya ka bhava
translatedName: Resolving triggers through mutual understanding bhava
description: May twin flames resolve emotional triggers by finding common understanding and harmony.

name: अस्थायी दूरी को स्थायी अलगाव न मानने की समझ भाव
englishName: Asthayi doori ko sthayi alagav na maanne ki samajh bhava
translatedName: Understanding temporary distance in connection bhava
description: May partners understand that distance during triggers can be temporary and supportive of inner peace.

name: आपसी सहमति और स्वाभाविक आकर्षण में स्वतंत्रता भाव
englishName: Aapsi sahmati aur swabhavik akarshan mein swatantrata bhava
translatedName: Freedom of mutual attraction with consent bhava
description: May intimate connections occur with mutual willingness, clarity, and comfort.

name: भय के सहारे मनवाने की प्रवृत्ति से मुक्ति भाव
englishName: Bhay ke sahare manvane ki pravritti se mukti bhava
translatedName: Freedom from influencing through fear bhava
description: May people stop using fear or urgency to impose their views or decisions.

name: ध्यान के वास्तविक अनुभव को समझने की जागरूकता भाव
englishName: Dhyan ke vastavik anubhav ko samajhne ki jagrukta bhava
translatedName: Understanding the true experience of meditation bhava
description: May people understand what meditation truly is through awareness and experience.

name: विवाह संबंधों में मैत्री और सह-अभिभावकता भाव
englishName: Vivah sambandhon mein maitri aur sah-abhivavakta bhava
translatedName: Friendship and co-parenting in relationships bhava
description: May couples maintain friendship and cooperative parenting even during relationship challenges.

name: अलगाव की स्थिति में न्यायपूर्ण साझेदारी का भाव
englishName: Alagav ki sthiti mein nyaypoorn saajhedari ka bhava
translatedName: Fair sharing in case of separation bhava
description: In case of separation, may fair and respectful sharing take place.

name: दूसरों की निजी समस्याओं पर चर्चा से संयम भाव
englishName: Doosron ki nijji samasyaon par charcha se sanyam bhava
translatedName: Restraint from discussing others’ problems bhava
description: May we avoid discussing or spreading others’ personal issues.

name: किसी के लिए कार्य करने से पहले उसकी इच्छा जानने की समझ भाव
englishName: Kisi ke liye karya karne se pehle uski ichha jaanne ki samajh bhava
translatedName: Understanding others’ needs before helping bhava
description: May we ask others what they truly need before doing something for them.

name: क्रोध और जलन बच्चों पर न निकालने का भाव
englishName: Krodh aur jalan bachchon par na nikalne ka bhava
translatedName: Not venting anger on children bhava
description: May parents avoid expressing anger or frustration toward children.

name: अंतरंग स्थितियों में आत्म-जिम्मेदारी और स्पष्टता भाव
englishName: Antarang sthitiyon mein aatma-zimmedari aur spashtata bhava
translatedName: Self-responsibility and clarity in intimate situations bhava
description: May individuals develop clarity and self-awareness regarding their own role and choices in intimate situations.

name: आर्थिक कारणों से बच्चों की चिकित्सा असहायता से सुरक्षा भाव
englishName: Aarthik kaaranon se bachchon ki chikitsa asahayata se suraksha bhava
translatedName: Protection from losing children due to medical expenses bhava
description: May no parent face helplessness in saving their child due to lack of medical funds.

name: दूसरों के कर्मों में उलझाव से मुक्ति भाव
englishName: Doosron ke karmon mein uljhaav se mukti bhava
translatedName: Freedom from entanglement in others’ karma bhava
description: May we remain aware of our own karmic path without becoming entangled in others’ karmas.

name: दबाव और छलपूर्ण व्यवहार की जागरूकता भाव
englishName: Dabaav aur chalpoorn vyavhaar ki jagrukta bhava
translatedName: Awareness of pressure and manipulation bhava
description: May those who pressure or manipulate others become aware of their behavior and transform it.

name: व्यक्तिगत गोपनीयता और सीमाओं की सुरक्षा भाव
englishName: Vyaktigat gopniyata aur seemaon ki suraksha bhava
translatedName: Protection of personal privacy and boundaries bhava
description: May people maintain personal privacy and healthy boundaries in their living and personal spaces.

name: अंतरंगता में दोनों साथियों की स्पष्ट सहमति का भाव
englishName: Antarangata mein dono saathiyon ki spasht sahmati ka bhava
translatedName: Clear mutual consent in intimacy bhava
description: May intimate relations happen only with clear and willing consent of both partners.

name: विशिष्ट अंतरंग क्रियाओं में प्राप्तकर्ता की सहमति का सम्मान भाव
englishName: Vishisht antarng kriyaon mein praptakarta ki sahmati ka sammaan bhava
translatedName: Respect for receiver partner consent in intimate acts bhava
description: May all intimate acts happen with the comfort, safety, and consent of the receiving partner.

name: अंतरंगता से जुड़े मिथकों से मुक्ति भाव
englishName: Antarangata se jude mithkon se mukti bhava
translatedName: Freedom from myths about intimacy bhava
description: May limiting beliefs and social myths related to intimacy be released and replaced with awareness and understanding.

name: अंतरंगता के विकल्पों में भावनात्मक स्वतंत्रता और स्वीकृति भाव
englishName: Antarangata ke vikalpon mein bhavnatmak swatantrata aur swikriti bhava
translatedName: Emotional openness towards alternative intimacy choices bhava
description: May individuals remain emotionally open and conscious while making intimacy choices aligned with their life path.

name: सहमति बदलने की स्वतंत्रता और आत्म-सम्मान भाव
englishName: Sahmati badalne ki swatantrata aur aatma-sammaan bhava
description: May people feel free to withdraw agreement respectfully if their feelings change later.

name: मृत्यु सत्य को समझने और स्वीकार करने की जागरूकता भाव
englishName: Mrityu satya ko samajhne aur swikaar karne ki jagrukta bhava
translatedName: Awareness and acceptance of death as truth bhava
description: May people understand and accept death as a natural and spiritual truth of existence.

name: कुंडलिनी के सत्य को समझने की जागरूकता भाव
englishName: Kundalini ke satya ko samajhne ki jagrukta bhava
translatedName: Awareness and understanding of Kundalini truth bhava
description: May people understand the true nature and wisdom of Kundalini awakening.

name: पारिवारिक मर्यादा और सम्मानपूर्ण प्रस्तुति भाव
englishName: Parivarik maryada aur sammaanpoorvak prastuti bhava
translatedName: Respectful self-presentation within family boundaries bhava
description: May people maintain sensitivity and respect in their appearance according to family and cultural comfort levels.

name: प्रेम में संतुलन और सहजता का भाव
englishName: Prem mein santulan aur sahajta ka bhava
translatedName: Ease and balance in love bhava
description: May people experience love with calmness, joy, and emotional stability.

name: स्वप्न लोक में सजग प्रवेश की क्षमता भाव
englishName: Swapn lok mein sajag pravesh ki kshamta bhava
translatedName: Conscious entry into dream world bhava
description: May people develop conscious awareness and entry into dream states when appropriate.

name: स्वतंत्रता में संयम और संतुलन भाव
englishName: Swatantrata mein sanyam aur santulan bhava
description: May people enjoy freedom while maintaining discipline and restraint in all areas of life.

name: ज्ञान में आत्मविश्वास और तुलना से मुक्ति भाव
englishName: Gyaan mein aatmavishwas aur tulna se mukti bhava
translatedName: Confidence in knowledge without comparison bhava
description: May people remain confident in their learning without fear of being judged or compared.

name: लोगों के आने-जाने से भावनात्मक स्थिरता भाव
englishName: Logon ke aane-jaane se bhavnatmak sthirta bhava
translatedName: Emotional stability despite people entering or leaving life bhava
description: May people remain emotionally stable despite changes in relationships or presence of others.

name: शारीरिक निकटता में सजग मर्यादा और विवेक भाव
englishName: Sharirik nikatata mein sajag maryada aur vivek bhava
translatedName: Mindful boundaries in physical closeness bhava
description: May physical closeness be maintained with awareness, trust, and appropriate relationship boundaries.

name: मजबूरी का लाभ उठाकर शोषण से निषेध भाव
englishName: Majboori ka laabh uthakar shoshan se nishedh bhava
translatedName: Prohibition of exploitation through helplessness bhava
description: May no one exploit another person’s helplessness for personal or sexual advantage.

name: मजबूरी का लाभ उठाकर अनुचित कार्य करवाने से निषेध भाव
englishName: Majboori ka laabh uthakar anuchit kaarya karvane se nishedh bhava
translatedName: Prohibition of exploiting helplessness for work bhava
description: May no one take advantage of another person’s helplessness to force work or obligations.

name: अनुभवी मार्गदर्शन को सम्मानपूर्वक स्वीकार करने की समझ भाव
englishName: Anubhavi margdarshan ko sammaanpoorvak swikaar karne ki samajh bhava
translatedName: Respectful acceptance of experienced guidance bhava
description: May people respect and consider experienced guidance before acting impulsively.

name: ध्वनि प्रदूषण से संयम और सामाजिक संवेदनशीलता भाव
englishName: Dhwani pradushan se sanyam aur samajik samvedansheelta bhava
description: May people avoid playing loud music that disturbs others.

name: संपत्ति प्रबंधन में जिम्मेदारी की समझ भाव
englishName: Sampatti prabandhan mein zimmedari ki samajh bhava
translatedName: Responsibility awareness in property management bhava
description: May property owners responsibly resolve disputes and support fair management of shared resources.

name: जिम्मेदारियों से बचने की प्रवृत्ति से मुक्ति भाव
englishName: Zimmedariyon se bachne ki pravritti se mukti bhava
description: May people accept and fulfill their responsibilities instead of avoiding them.

description: When angry, hurt, or panicked, may we handle situations calmly instead of creating further problems.

name: उत्तर न मिलने की स्थिति को शालीनता से संभालने की समझ भाव
englishName: Uttar na milne ki sthiti ko shaalinta se sambhalne ki samajh bhava
translatedName: Graceful handling of silence or non-response bhava
description: When people stop responding or avoid conversation, may we handle the situation with grace and maturity.

name: बार-बार मूत्र त्याग की तीव्र इच्छा में कमी भाव
englishName: Baar-baar mutra tyag ki teevr ichha mein kami bhava
translatedName: Reduction in frequent urge to urinate bhava
description: May the frequent and unnecessary urge to urinate reduce significantly.

name: स्खलन के बाद मूत्र त्याग की बाधा से मुक्ति भाव
englishName: Skhalan ke baad mutra tyag ki badha se mukti bhava
translatedName: Relief from post-ejaculation urinary discomfort bhava
description: May the discomfort and urge to urinate after ejaculation resolve completely and naturally.

name: स्त्रियों में सहज और प्राकृतिक गर्भधारण क्षमता भाव
englishName: Striyon mein sahaj aur prakritik garbhadhan kshamta bhava
translatedName: Natural and easy conception for women bhava
description: May women be able to conceive easily and naturally.

name: यौन स्वच्छता और शारीरिक सीमाओं की समझ भाव
englishName: Yaun swachhta aur sharirik seemaon ki samajh bhava
translatedName: Understanding of sexual hygiene and physical boundaries bhava
description: May people maintain proper hygiene and physical boundaries during intimate interactions.

name: यौन क्रिया में अपमानजनक व्यवहार से संयम भाव
englishName: Yaun kriya mein apmaan janak vyavhaar se sanyam bhava
translatedName: Restraint from degrading sexual behaviors bhava
description: May intimate interactions remain respectful and dignified.

name: बाल यौन शोषण निषेध भाव
translatedName: Restraint from sex with blood relatives
description: May mother and father don't have sex their children whether boy or girl.

name: यौन क्रिया के उद्देश्य की स्पष्ट समझ भाव
englishName: Yaun kriya ke uddeshya ki spasht samajh bhava
translatedName: Clarity about the purpose of intimacy bhava
description: May men and women understand intimacy as a mutual and conscious exchange.

name: वीर्य ऊर्जा के आदान-प्रदान की जागरूकता भाव
englishName: Veerya urja ke aadaan-pradaan ki jagrukta bhava
translatedName: Awareness of vital energy exchange bhava
description: May there be awareness of energetic exchange during intimate union.

name: हिंसा की प्रवृत्ति का समापन भाव
englishName: Hinsa ki pravritti ka samaapan bhava
description: May violence dissolve from individuals and society.

name: संबंध में प्रथम प्राथमिकता मिलने की समझ भाव
englishName: Sambandh mein pratham prathmikta milne ki samajh bhava
translatedName: Choosing relationships where we are a priority bhava
description: May we choose a relationship where we are the other person’s first priority.

name: तनाव या बीमारी के लिए दोषारोपण त्याग भाव
englishName: Tanav ya bimari ke liye dosharopan tyaag bhava
translatedName: Letting go of blaming others for suffering bhava
description: May people stop blaming others for their stress, illness, or suffering.

name: तनाव और बीमारी के कारण स्वयं में देखने की समझ भाव
englishName: Tanav aur bimari ke kaaran swayam mein dekhne ki samajh bhava
translatedName: Self-reflection for causes of stress and illness bhava
description: May we understand our own role in stress or illness instead of assuming others are the cause.

name: सुनने से बचने के बहानों से मुक्ति भाव
englishName: Sunne se bachne ke bahano se mukti bhava
description: May we listen when it is our turn, instead of running away or using stress as an excuse.

name: ट्रिगर होने की जगह मनन की क्षमता भाव
englishName: Trigger hone ki jagah manan ki kshamta bhava
translatedName: Reflection instead of being triggered bhava
description: May people reflect on Param’s words instead of getting triggered or hurt by them.

name: परिवर्तन के प्रति प्रतिरोध में कमी भाव
englishName: Parivartan ke prati pratirodh mein kami bhava
description: May resistance to change reduce significantly for everyone.

name: वीडियो सृजन में प्रोत्साहन और समर्थन भाव
englishName: Video srijan mein protsahan aur samarthan bhava
description: May Ritu encourage creative video creation instead of stopping it.

name: टिप्पणियों को शालीनता से ग्रहण करने की क्षमता भाव
englishName: Tippaniyon ko shaalinta se grahan karne ki kshamta bhava
description: May Ritu handle comments about herself or her family gracefully without losing inner peace.

name: आलोचनाओं को शालीनता से लेने की समझ भाव
englishName: Alochnaon ko shaalinta se lene ki samajh bhava
description: May people receive comments about themselves or their family with grace.

name: हस्तक्षेप के बीच केंद्र में बने रहने की क्षमता भाव
englishName: Hastakshep ke beech kendra mein bane rehne ki kshamta bhava
description: May we remain centered during conflicts or interference so they do not affect us.

name: अचानक की गई सहायता को आवश्यक समझने की समझ भाव
englishName: Achanak ki gayi sahayata ko avashyak samajhne ki samajh bhava
description: When sudden help is required, may we understand its necessity instead of panicking.

name: दो व्यक्तियों के विवाद में हस्तक्षेप से संयम भाव
englishName: Do vyaktiyon ke vivaad mein hastakshep se sanyam bhava
translatedName: Restraint from interfering in others’ conflicts bhava
description: May people avoid interfering in conflicts or discussions between two individuals.

name: संबंधों में झगड़े के बाद जल्द निर्णय न लेने की समझ भाव
englishName: Sambandhon mein jhagde ke baad jald nirnay na lene ki samajh bhava
description: May partners not take immediate separation decisions after conflicts.

name: साधना पथ पर आगे बढ़ने का साहस और शक्ति भाव
englishName: Sadhana path par aage badhne ka sahas aur shakti bhava
translatedName: Courage to move forward on the path of sadhana bhava
description: May we all develop courage and strength to move ahead on the path of sadhana.

name: रोग के कारण में अटकने की जगह उपचार की ओर बढ़ने का भाव
englishName: Rog ke kaaran mein atakne ki jagah upchar ki aur badhne ka bhava
translatedName: Moving towards healing instead of fixation on disease cause bhava
description: May we move forward in healing instead of finding comfort in the cause of disease.

name: जल्दबाज़ी में अधूरा काम छोड़ने से संयम भाव
englishName: Jaldbaazi mein adhoora kaam chhodne se sanyam bhava
description: May we not rush and leave work half done.

name: पानी को पीने योग्य बनाने के लिए फ़िल्टर पर निर्भरता से मुक्ति भाव
englishName: Pani ko peene yogya banane ke liye filter par nirbharta se mukti bhava
translatedName: Freedom from dependency on water filters bhava
description: May we not need water filters to make water drinkable.

name: अपने निर्णय सबको समझाने की बाध्यता से मुक्ति भाव
englishName: Apne nirnay sabko samjhane ki badhyata se mukti bhava
translatedName: Freedom from explaining every decision bhava
description: May we not feel the need to explain every decision we make to everyone.

name: बिना कारण बदनाम न किए जाने की समझ भाव
englishName: Bina kaaran badnaam na kiye jaane ki samajh bhava
description: May people not unnecessarily defame someone or create false narratives that harm others.

name: अपनी वस्तु पर पूर्ण स्वायत्तता का भाव
englishName: Apni vastu par poorn swatantrata ka bhava
translatedName: Freedom over one’s own belongings bhava
description: May we understand that what someone does with their own belongings should not disturb others.

name: अनावश्यक हंगामा न करने की समझ भाव
englishName: Anavashyak hungama na karne ki samajh bhava
translatedName: Freedom from creating unnecessary ruckus bhava
description: May people stop creating unnecessary noise, drama, or arguments.

name: तीर्थयात्रा की अनिवार्यता भ्रम से मुक्ति भाव
englishName: Teerthyatra ki anivaryata ke bhram se mukti bhava
translatedName: Freedom from the belief that pilgrimage is necessary bhava
description: May we understand that there is no compulsory need to go on pilgrimages.

name: दिव्यांग लोगों का उपहास न करने की संवेदना भाव
englishName: Divyang logon ka uphaas na karne ki samvedna bhava
translatedName: Compassion towards people with disabilities bhava
description: May people not mock or ridicule differently-abled individuals.

name: पुनर्जन्म से जुड़े मिथकों की स्पष्टता भाव
englishName: Punarjanm se jude mithkon ki spashtata bhava
description: May all myths related to reincarnation become clear and dissolve.

name: पुनर्जन्म की वास्तविकता की समझ भाव
englishName: Punarjanm ki vastavikta ki samajh bhava
description: May we understand and acknowledge that reincarnation is real.

name: पुनर्जन्म से जुड़े संदेहों की समाप्ति भाव
englishName: Punarjanm se jude sandehon ki samapti bhava
translatedName: Resolution of doubts about reincarnation bhava
description: May all doubts related to reincarnation be cleared or dissolved.

name: विवाह निर्णय में सामाजिक स्वीकृति भाव
englishName: Vivaah nirnay mein samajik swikriti bhava
translatedName: Social acceptance of marriage choices bhava
description: If two people wish to marry, may others accept their decision instead of opposing it.

name: साधना हेतु उपयुक्त दीक्षा का मार्गदर्शन भाव
englishName: Sadhna ke liye upyukt deeksha ka margdarshan bhava
translatedName: Appropriate initiation for spiritual practices bhava
description: May people receive proper initiation before undertaking any spiritual practice.

name: अप्रशिक्षित कुंडलिनी शिक्षा से होने वाले नुकसान की समझ भाव
englishName: Aprashikshit kundalini shiksha se hone wale nuksaan ki samajh bhava
translatedName: Awareness of harm from untrained Kundalini teaching bhava
description: May people understand that teaching Kundalini or Kriya Yoga without proper training can harm others.

name: अप्रशिक्षित ट्विन फ्लेम कोचिंग से होने वाले नुकसान की समझ भाव
englishName: Aprashikshit twin flame coaching se hone wale nuksaan ki samajh bhava
translatedName: Awareness of harm from untrained twin flame coaching bhava
description: May people understand that becoming a twin flame coach without training can damage others.

name: विद्यार्थी की आत्मनिर्भरता और भावनात्मक दृढ़ता भाव
englishName: Vidyarthi ki aatmanirbharta aur bhavnatmak dridhta bhava
description: May students not depend on teachers for every problem and develop inner strength.

name: संबंधों में भावनात्मक आत्मनिर्भरता भाव
description: May relationship partners become emotionally strong instead of depending on the other for every problem.

name: गुरु को ऊर्जा स्रोत के रूप में समझ भाव
englishName: Guru ko urja strot ke roop mein samajh bhava
translatedName: Understanding teacher as an energy source bhava
description: May students realise that their teacher is a source of energy and guidance.

name: ऋतु द्वारा परम को ऊर्जा स्रोत के रूप में समझ भाव
englishName: Ritu dwara Param ko urja strot ke roop mein samajh bhava
translatedName: Ritu understanding Param as her energy source bhava
description: May Ritu realise and understand that Param is her source of energy.

name: मानसिक विषयों पर उचित मार्गदर्शन का प्रसार भाव
englishName: Mansik vishayon par upyukt margdarshan ka prasaar bhava
translatedName: Spreading proper guidance on mental issues bhava
description: May correct and responsible guidance on mental health reach the audience through Ritu.

name: झगड़े के बाद खुलने के भय से मुक्ति भाव
englishName: Jhagde ke baad khulne ke bhay se mukti bhava
translatedName: Freedom from fear of opening up after conflict bhava
description: May we move beyond the fear of opening up after a fight and feel safe to communicate, even when uncertainty or anxiety arises.

name: प्रत्येक कर्म विश्वासपूर्वक करने का भाव
englishName: Pratyek karam vishwaspoorvak karne ka bhava
translatedName: Performing every action with trust bhava
description: May we perform every action with inner trust, faith, and steadiness.

name: स्थानीय लोगों द्वारा बाहरी लोगों के शोषण से मुक्ति भाव
englishName: Sthaniya logon dwara bahari logon ke shoshan se mukti bhava
translatedName: Freedom from exploitation of outsiders by locals bhava
description: May local people not exploit, cheat, or seek unfair favours from those who come from outside.

name: अनावश्यक परेशान करने की प्रवृत्ति से मुक्ति भाव
englishName: Anavashyak pareshan karne ki pravritti se mukti bhava
description: May people stop unnecessarily troubling or harassing others without reason.

name: दूसरे के कार्य या जीवन में स्थान के लिए कृतज्ञता भाव
englishName: Doosre ke kaarya ya jeevan mein sthaan ke liye kritagyata bhava
translatedName: Gratitude for being given space in others’ life or business bhava
description: When entering someone else’s running business or life, may we not assume equal ownership but feel gratitude that we were given a place.

name: साझेदारी में अहसान की समय पर समझ भाव
englishName: Saajhedaari mein ahsaan ki samay par samajh bhava
translatedName: Timely understanding of gratitude in partnership bhava
description: If we enter a partnership, may we recognize the other person’s contribution in time, not after conflict or separation.

name: ना कहने पर अपराधबोध से मुक्ति भाव
englishName: Na kehne par apradhbodh se mukti bhava
translatedName: Freedom from guilt while saying no bhava
description: When we refuse to lend things due to fear of misuse, may we say no without guilt or regret.

name: घबराहट में जल्दबाज़ी से निर्णय न लेने का भाव
englishName: Ghabrahat mein jaldbaazi se nirnay na lene ka bhava
description: May we avoid making quick decisions in anxiety and instead decide with calm understanding.

name: घबराहट में तुरंत कॉल या संदेश न करने का संयम भाव
englishName: Ghabrahat mein turant call ya message na karne ka sanyam bhava
description: During anxiety, may we pause instead of calling or messaging everyone, allowing the anxiety to pass.

name: कार्य निकलवाते समय अहं त्याग और नम्रता भाव
englishName: Kaarya nikalvate samay ahankaar tyaag aur namrata bhava
description: When we need work done by someone, may we keep ego aside and seek guidance with humility.

name: सीखने और समायोजन के लिए समय की समझ भाव
englishName: Seekhne aur samayojan ke liye samay ki samajh bhava
translatedName: Understanding learning and adjustment time bhava
description: When we hand over work, may we understand that learning and adjustment take time.

name: लावारिस और आवारा पशु समस्या समाधान भाव
englishName: Lawaris aur awara pashu samasya samaadhan bhava
translatedName: Resolution of stray animal issues bhava
description: May the issue of abandoned and stray animals be resolved with compassion.

name: सीट साझा करने की सहज स्वीकृति भाव
englishName: Seat saajha karne ki sahaj swikriti bhava
description: May we not feel offended if someone occupies our seat and easily share or exchange places.

name: दूसरों के जीवन जीने के तरीके पर नियंत्रण इच्छा त्याग भाव
englishName: Doosron ke jeevan jeene ke tareeke par niyantran ichha tyaag bhava
translatedName: Letting go of controlling others’ life choices bhava
description: May we let go of the desire to make others live or work according to our expectations.

name: आत्मघाती प्रवृत्ति का समापन भाव
description: May suicidal tendencies completely dissolve from the world.

name: तनाव को सकारात्मक रूप से संभालने की क्षमता भाव
englishName: Tanav ko sakaratmak roop se sambhalne ki kshamta bhava
translatedName: Ability to handle stress positively bhava
description: May everyone, including Ritu, learn to handle stress positively instead of reacting by asking others not to give stress.

name: विकास में परम की भूमिका समझ भाव
englishName: Vikas mein Param ki bhoomika samajh bhava
translatedName: Understanding Param’s role in growth bhava
description: May Ritu understand Param’s role in her growth instead of blaming him for stress.

name: तनाव देने वाले व्यक्ति की भूमिका समझ भाव
englishName: Tanav dene wale vyakti ki bhoomika samajh bhava
translatedName: Understanding the role of stress-giver bhava
description: May people understand the role of a stress-giving person instead of blaming that person.

name: नए तुलनात्मक विचार त्याग भाव
translatedName: Letting go of constant comparison bhava
description: May we stop inventing new kinds of comparisons in the mind.

name: एकतरफा बातों में न आने की समझ भाव
englishName: Ektarfa baaton mein na aane ki samajh bhava
description: May we not accept one-sided stories as truth or get influenced by them.

name: कहानी के दो पहलू समझने की बुद्धि भाव
englishName: Kahani ke do pehlu samajhne ki buddhi bhava
translatedName: Understanding both sides of a story bhava
description: May we understand that every story has two sides.

name: घबराहट से अप्रभावित रहने का भाव
englishName: Ghabrahat se aprabhavit rehne ka bhava
translatedName: Freedom from anxiety and panic bhava
description: May we not get affected by anxiety or nervousness.

name: नियंत्रण की आवश्यकता त्याग भाव
description: May we let go of the need to control someone, something, or situations.

name: स्वामित्व की भावना त्याग भाव
description: May we let go of the need to own someone or something.

name: आत्मघाती विचारों से मुक्ति भाव
description: May we remain free from suicidal thoughts.

name: अनावश्यक संग्रह मानसिकता से मुक्ति भाव
englishName: Anavashyak sangrah mansikta se mukti bhava
translatedName: Freedom from hoarding and antique-collection mindset bhava
description: May people come out of the mindset of collecting antiques and stop wasting money on such items.

name: ऋतु अवसाद मुक्त स्वास्थ्य लाभ भाव
englishName: Ritu avsaad mukt swasthya laabh bhava
translatedName: Recovery from depression and return to healthy life bhava
description: May Ritu gently come out of depression and return to a balanced, healthy, and joyful life.

name: अवसाद पीड़ित स्वास्थ्य पुनर्प्राप्ति भाव
translatedName: Return to health for depression patients bhava
description: May all those suffering from depression gradually return to a healthy, stable, and fulfilled life.

name: सभी रोगों से स्वास्थ्य लाभ भाव
englishName: Sabhi rogon se swasthya laabh bhava
translatedName: Healing and return to health from all illnesses bhava
description: May all people suffering from any kind of illness return to complete health and well-being.

name: कपटपूर्ण भावनात्मक उपयोग से मुक्ति भाव
englishName: Kapatpurn Bhavanatmak Upyog Se Mukti Bhava
description: Blessing to remain honest in emotions and not use crying, distress, or emotional displays to manipulate others or to get one’s way.

name: सहानुभूति के दुरुपयोग से विरक्ति भाव
englishName: Sahanubhooti Ke Durupyog Se Virakti Bhava
description: Blessing to stop using sympathy, illness, or weakness as a means to extract work or favors from others, and instead live with responsibility and dignity.

name: सीमा सम्मान और अनावश्यक आग्रह मुक्ति भाव
englishName: Seema Samman Aur Anavashyak Aagrah Mukti Bhava
translatedName: Respect for Boundaries and Freedom from Force
description: Blessing that no one forces another into outings, meetings, or engagements against their will, and personal boundaries are naturally respected.

name: समय और निजता सम्मान भाव
description: Blessing that people respect personal time, avoid unnecessary early disturbances, and meet others only with prior appointments and invitations.

name: अतिथि सत्कार विशेष कृपा भाव
description: Blessing that sincere students or seekers who come with respect receive special grace and positive energies whenever they visit.

name: उद्देश्य की सही समझ भाव
description: Blessing to understand that guidance, teachings, or content shared by a teacher are for collective growth and awareness, not for personal targeting or harm.

name: पूर्ण समर्पण और विश्वास भाव
description: Blessing to develop deep trust and surrender in a sacred teacher–student relationship, offering body, mind, and resources with awareness and faith.

name: ईमानदार अनुरोध और नैतिक व्यवहार भाव
englishName: Imandaar Anurodh Aur Naitik Vyavahar Bhava
description: Blessing to refrain from making dishonest or non-genuine requests and to live with fairness, responsibility, and ethical clarity.

name: ऊर्जा संतुलन और पारिवारिक प्राथमिकता भाव
englishName: Urja Santulan Aur Parivarik Prathmikta Bhava
description: Blessing to not overextend oneself into others’ problems at the cost of one’s own family peace, energy, and responsibilities.

name: संबंधों में उपस्थिति और संवेदनशीलता भाव
englishName: Sambandhon Mein Upasthiti Aur Samvedansheelta Bhava
description: Blessing that partners give adequate time, attention, and emotional presence to each other, honoring the needs of the relationship.

name: विराम और सजगता भाव
description: Blessing to pause calmly when something is not working, instead of reacting with panic or haste, allowing clarity to arise naturally.

name: सहमति और संतुष्टि आधारित अंतरंगता भाव
englishName: Sahmati Aur Santushti Aadharit Antarangta Bhava
description: Blessing for intimacy that is guided by mutual consent, sensitivity, responsiveness, and care, so that both partners feel satisfied, safe, and fulfilled.

name: निस्पृह अभिवृत्ति भाव
description: Blessing to remain unaffected when others demand, instruct, or impose expectations that are against one’s will or inner alignment. One stays calm, centered, and inwardly free, without emotional disturbance or the need to react.

name: अभिव्यक्ति आग्रह शमन भाव
description: Blessing that the inner compulsion to express, explain, or seek validation from others becomes calm and balanced. Expression happens only when needed, without craving response, approval, or recognition.

name: अनावश्यक समझाने से विरति भाव
description: Blessing to release the habit of persuading, convincing, or pushing others to act according to one’s own views. Respect for free will deepens, and trust replaces force.

name: असुरक्षा आवरण शोर मुक्त भाव
translatedName: Freedom from Noise Used to Mask Insecurity
description: Blessing that one no longer uses loudness, excessive talking, or noise to hide fear, insecurity, or lack of results. Authentic presence replaces performative behavior.

name: शांत सामर्थ्य बोध भाव
description: Blessing to realize that true power never needs shouting, aggression, or force. Strength expresses itself naturally through calm authority, clarity, and grounded presence.

name: स्वीकार यथारूप भाव
description: Blessing that one is able to accept another person exactly as they are, without attempting to change, control, or reshape them according to personal preferences. Through this acceptance, resistance dissolves and harmony becomes possible.

name: प्रतिरोध द्वारा प्रतिबिंब बोध भाव
description: Blessing to understand that whatever behavior we resist, suppress, or forbid in another often continues to appear until it is fully accepted within awareness. Acceptance brings release, while resistance sustains repetition.

name: अनावश्यक टकराव निरोध भाव
description: Blessing that people do not deliberately provoke, interfere, or create unnecessary conflicts for personal gain or manipulation, and interactions remain respectful and lawful.

name: सहायता स्वीकार विनम्रता भाव
description: Blessing that we are able to soften our ego and accept help from others when needed, understanding that receiving support is also a form of strength and wisdom.

name: ट्रिगर पर आत्म-अवलोकन भाव
description: Blessing that when someone feels triggered by words, videos, or teachings, they turn inward for self-observation and self-correction instead of reacting with blame, tears, control, advice, or hostility toward others.

name: असहज सत्य स्वीकार भाव
description: Blessing that we are able to accept truth even when it is uncomfortable or challenges our self-image, allowing accountability, correction, and alignment with reality.

name: माता-पिता श्रवण भाव
description: Blessing that children naturally develop the capacity to listen to their parents with openness, respect, and receptivity, without fear or resistance.

name: सहज आज्ञाकारिता भाव
description: Blessing that children become obedient to their parents in a healthy and conscious way—out of understanding and trust, not pressure or fear.

name: त्रुटि स्वीकार सहजता भाव
description: Blessing that we are able to acknowledge our mistakes with a relaxed and open heart, without defensiveness, guilt, or self-judgment.

name: गलती स्वीकार सहज आराम भाव
description: Blessing that we feel comfortable admitting our mistakes, seeing them as part of growth rather than as a threat to our identity or worth.

name: तर्क बोध जागरण भाव
description: Blessing that people engaging in logical arguments become aware of what they are truly saying and doing, and whether their logic is aligned with truth, compassion, and responsibility.

name: आध्यात्मिक अपराध विरति भावा
description: Blessing that we remain aligned with integrity and do not commit spiritual misconduct such as misuse of teachings, false claims, or manipulation in the name of spirituality.

name: दीक्षा बोध जागरण भावा
translatedName: Awareness of the Need for Deeksha
description: Blessing that spiritual seekers clearly understand that spiritual sciences become truly effective only when received through proper Deeksha from an authentic Guru.

name: प्रामाणिक स्रोत कुंडलिनी भावा
description: Blessing that seekers learn Kriya Kundalini Yoga only from authentic, verified, and realized sources, avoiding shortcuts and unsafe practices.

name: विवेकपूर्ण गुरु चयन भावा
description: Blessing that spiritual seekers use intelligence, discrimination, and clarity when choosing a teacher, especially for powerful practices like Kriya Kundalini Yoga.

name: गुरु संग और आज्ञा पालन भावा
englishName: Guru Sang Aur Aagya Palan Bhava
translatedName: Staying with the Guru and Following Guidance
description: Blessing that we understand the importance of staying connected with the Guru and sincerely following their guidance, not selectively but with humility.

name: सजीव गुरु संबंध भावा
description: Blessing that seekers form a living, reachable relationship with a real Guru rather than relying only on distant or mental concepts of guidance.

name: गुरु उत्तरदायित्व बोध भावा
translatedName: Awareness of Accountability to the Guru
description: Blessing that we realize we are answerable to our Guru, and our actions carry responsibility within the spiritual path.

name: स्वेच्छाचार संयम भावा
description: Blessing that we understand we cannot act purely on impulse or ego, as we are guided and held accountable within the Guru–disciple framework.

name: गुरु प्राथमिकता बोध भावा
description: Blessing that Ritu realizes Param is her teacher first, and all other relationships or roles remain secondary to the Guru–disciple bond.

name: दर्पण से उपचार भावा
description: Blessing that when Param highlights a pattern in Ritu, she does not withdraw or escape, but receives help from Param to heal or release that pattern.

name: ट्विन फ्लेम गुरु शिष्य बोध भावा
englishName: Twin Flame Guru Shishya Bodh Bhava
description: Blessing that all twin flame pairs realize their relationship is primarily a teacher–student dynamic, with all other roles remaining secondary.

name: कठोर करुणा स्वीकार भावा
description: Blessing that people understand strong correction from the Guru as compassionate guidance meant for growth, not as personal harm or insult.

name: आध्यात्मिक प्राधिकार बोध भावा
description: Blessing that people clearly recognize Param as the authority on twin flames and Maha Guru as the supreme, highest authority.

name: पाप शुद्धि एवं विघ्न नाश भावा
englishName: Paap Shuddhi Evam Vighna Nash Bhava
description: Blessing that for Param, past karmic burdens dissolve and obstacles arising from misaligned practices are removed.

name: नाग दोष मुक्ति भावा
description: Blessing that all beings are freed from the karmic and energetic effects traditionally associated with Naag Dosh.

name: सीमा संरक्षण भावा
description: Blessing that we do not allow others to violate or break our personal, emotional, or spiritual boundaries.

name: झूठे मुकदमे विरति भावा
description: Blessing that people refrain from filing false cases or accusations and choose truth and justice.

name: सत्ता सदुपयोग भावा
description: Blessing that people in positions of power—police, judges, lawyers, politicians—use their authority ethically and do not misuse it.

name: प्रशासनिक करुणा एवं समाधान भावा
description: Blessing that authority figures and government machinery act with compassion and efficiency to genuinely solve people’s problems.

name: दर्पण स्वीकार भावा
description: Blessing that when we show someone a mirror in any relationship—romantic, teacher-student, or otherwise—they do not run away to alternate relationships, but instead reflect, resolve their inner issues, and return with maturity.

name: स्वीकृति एवं क्षमा भावा
description: Blessing that people become aware of their own behavior, take responsibility for their actions, and sincerely apologize before reconnecting.

name: अंतिम समय करुणा भावा
translatedName: Compassion at the End of Life
description: Blessing that we do not speak ill of, curse, or hold negativity toward anyone—especially when a person is dying—and instead remain compassionate and silent if needed.

name: उपयोग बनाम प्रेम विवेक भावा
translatedName: Understanding the Difference Between Using and Loving
description: Blessing that we deeply understand what it means to use someone versus loving them, and we choose relationships rooted in respect rather than benefit.

name: वित्तीय गोपनीयता भावा
description: Blessing that we avoid discussing money-related matters in public and maintain dignity, discretion, and boundaries around finances.

name: डिजिटल संयम भावा
description: Blessing that we use phone screens in a balanced and conscious manner, protecting our attention, eyes, and mental peace.

name: मानसिक हिंसा मुक्ति भावा
description: Blessing that psychological violence—manipulation, gaslighting, emotional abuse—ends, and relationships become emotionally safe and respectful.

name: योगी पहचान जागरण भावा
description: Blessing that we realize and remember that we are yogis—living with awareness, discipline, balance, and inner alignment.

name: कष्ट से विराम और राहत की प्रार्थना
description: A blessing that Param and Ritu receive relief and rest after prolonged phases of suffering, allowing space for ease and healing.

name: बिना समझे किसी के कार्य में शामिल न होने की विवेकशीलता
description: A blessing that we do not agree impulsively to support others without understanding the impact and hardship involved.

name: धार्मिक नेताओं द्वारा साधकों को सही मार्गदर्शन
description: A blessing that religious leaders guide seekers on the correct and ethical spiritual path.

name: कार्य को समय रहते पूरा करने की आदत
description: A blessing that we do not postpone work until the last moment and instead complete it in a timely manner.

name: अपनी इच्छाओं के लिए दूसरों के घर का संतुलन न बिगाड़ने की समझ
englishName: Respecting Others’ Space While Fulfilling Desires
description: A blessing that in fulfilling our desires, we do not disturb or disrupt the systems and balance of others’ homes.

name: रसायन और कीटनाशक मुक्त भोजन
description: A blessing that food is free from harmful chemicals and pesticides, supporting natural health.

name: माता-पिता द्वारा बच्चों पर चिल्लाने की प्रवृत्ति का अंत
englishName: Ending the Pattern of Parents Shouting at Children
description: A blessing that parents release the habit of shouting at children and interact with patience and understanding.

name: महागुरु, परम और रितु के लिए भौतिक समृद्धि
englishName: Material Prosperity for Mahaguru, Param and Ritu
description: A blessing for material prosperity, comfort, and stability for Mahaguru, Param, and Ritu.

name: पुरुषों में स्त्री की पूर्ण संतुष्टि देने की क्षमता
englishName: Men Being Able to Fully Satisfy Their Partner
description: A blessing that men develop sensitivity, presence, and capacity to bring deep satisfaction and fulfillment to their partner.

name: स्त्री की अव्यक्त अपेक्षाओं से मुक्ति
description: A blessing that a woman is free from the expectation that her partner should understand her feelings without her expressing them.

name: अपनी ही बुद्धि से आत्मविनाश न करने की समझ
description: A blessing that we do not use our own intelligence in ways that lead to our downfall.

name: बहुआयामी समय की समझ और अनुभूति
description: A blessing that we gain awareness and experience of multidimensional time beyond linear perception.

name: दूसरों से अनावश्यक कार्य करवाने की प्रवृत्ति से मुक्ति
englishName: Freedom from Assigning Unnecessary Tasks to Others
description: A blessing that we refrain from asking others to do unnecessary or meaningless tasks.

name: बच्चों का प्रचार हेतु उपयोग न करने की जागरूकता
englishName: Awareness to Not Use Children for Publicity
description: A blessing that children are not used for publicity or attention-seeking purposes.

name: पुरानी आदतों को दोहराने से पहले ठहराव की क्षमता
englishName: Ability to Pause Before Repeating Old Habits
description: A blessing that when the mind urges repetition of old habits, we pause and respond consciously.

name: कर्मफल से जूझ रहे व्यक्ति की सहायता हेतु सामूहिक करुणा
englishName: Collective Support for Those Facing Karma
description: A blessing that when someone is suffering due to past actions, others step forward to help them come out of that cycle.

name: बासी या पुराना भोजन वितरित न होने की व्यवस्था
description: A blessing that stale or old food is not distributed to anyone.

name: बासी या पुराना भोजन न खाने की सजगता
englishName: Awareness to Avoid Eating Stale Food
description: A blessing that we remain aware and avoid consuming stale or old food.

name: ज्ञान मार्ग पर चल रहे पुरुषों की अहंकार से मुक्ति
englishName: Men on the Path of Knowledge Free from Ego
description: A blessing that men walking the path of knowledge are free from ego.

name: गुरु के संदेशों को सर्वोच्च प्राथमिकता देने की तत्परता
description: A blessing that when a teacher communicates, it is responded to with first priority.

name: जल स्रोतों की स्वच्छता हेतु वैकल्पिक व्यवस्था
englishName: Alternative Systems to Protect Water Bodies
description: A blessing that alternative arrangements are used instead of polluting water bodies.

name: किसी भी प्रकार के अन्याय से मुक्ति
englishName: Freedom from All Forms of Oppression
description: A blessing that any form of injustice or oppression being faced comes to an end.

name: काल्पनिक स्मृतियों पर आधारित विवादों से मुक्ति
englishName: Freedom from Arguments Based on Imaginary Memories
description: A blessing that people do not argue or fight with others based on imagined or invalid memories.

name: जीवन के उत्तरार्ध में संन्यास धर्म की स्वाभाविक स्वीकृति
englishName: Natural Acceptance of Sanyas in Later Life
description: A blessing that after a certain age, people naturally follow sanyas dharma with ease and acceptance.

name: सहानुभूति पाने हेतु बीमारी का नाटक करने की प्रवृत्ति से मुक्ति
englishName: Freedom from Pretending Illness for Sympathy
description: A blessing that people do not exaggerate or pretend illness, sickness, or depression to seek sympathy or soften others.

name: रितु द्वारा मानसिक स्थिति को माता-पिता से ईमानदारी से साझा करने की क्षमता
englishName: Ritu Sharing Mental Health Honestly with Parents
description: A blessing that Ritu is able to openly and honestly share her mental challenges with her parents without hesitation.

name: विवाहित स्त्री द्वारा वैवाहिक समस्याएँ माता-पिता से साझा करने की सहजता
englishName: Ease in Sharing Married Life Issues with Parents
description: A blessing that a married woman can freely and honestly share her married life challenges with her parents.

name: परिवार द्वारा समस्याओं के समाधान हेतु साथ यात्रा करने की तत्परता
englishName: Family Willingness to Travel Together for Resolution
description: A blessing that family members willingly travel together to resolve pending issues wherever required.

name: उत्पाद नहीं, समस्या से विवाह की दृष्टि
englishName: Marrying the Problem, Not the Product
description: A blessing to focus on the real problem being solved rather than getting attached only to the product.

name: रिश्तों में एक-दूसरे के लिए संपत्ति बनने का भाव
englishName: Being an Asset to Each Other in Relationships
description: A blessing that people in relationships become assets to each other rather than liabilities.

name: अप्रकट परिणामों में भी परम का तरल भाव
englishName: Param Remaining Fluid When Things Don’t Materialize
description: A blessing that when something does not materialize, Param does not create heartbreak and keeps the energy fluid for future possibilities.

name: पति-पत्नी के बीच संपत्ति का समान विभाजन
englishName: Equal Distribution of Property Between Partners
description: A blessing that property and money between husband and wife are equally shared to remove insecurity.

name: स्त्री की ‘अपना घर’ वाली आसक्ति से मुक्ति
englishName: Freedom from Attachment to Owning a House
description: A blessing that a woman becomes free from the inner compulsion of needing a separate house for security.

name: सूर्य प्रकाश के रस का अनुभव
description: A blessing that we enjoy sunlight deeply and feel its nourishing essence on our body.

name: ई-वेस्ट का उचित निपटान और पुनर्चक्रण
englishName: Proper Disposal and Recycling of eWaste
description: A blessing that electronic waste is disposed of and recycled responsibly.

name: चिकित्सा विज्ञान का व्यक्तिगत लाभ से ऊपर उठना
englishName: Medical Science Rising Above Personal Gain
description: A blessing that medical science rises above personal benefits and serves humanity selflessly.

name: डॉक्टरों द्वारा प्राणायाम की सलाह
description: A blessing that doctors increasingly recommend pranayama practices like nadi shodhan for holistic well-being.

name: भावनाओं द्वारा सही दिशा-निर्देशन
englishName: Emotions Guiding in the Right Direction
description: A blessing that our emotions guide us toward the right direction instead of confusing or misdirecting us.

name: बहस में सुनने की वास्तविक समझ
description: A blessing that people realize during arguments they often do not listen, but only interpret things in their own mind.

name: स्त्री की प्रेमपूर्ण वाणी की शक्ति की पहचान
englishName: Recognition of the Power of Loving Tone
description: A blessing that women recognize the power and healing strength of their loving tone.

name: रितु द्वारा प्रेमपूर्ण वाणी की शक्ति की पहचान
englishName: Ritu Recognizing the Power of Her Loving Tone
description: A blessing that Ritu becomes aware of and embodies the power of her loving tone.

name: परम के प्रति भक्ति भाव में सहज प्रवेश
englishName: Ease in Entering Bhakti Bhav for Param
description: A blessing that Ritu naturally comes into bhakti bhav toward Param.

name: अमान्य प्रश्नों की पहचान की समझ
description: A blessing that Ritu understands that certain questions arising from the mind are not valid.

name: काल्पनिक प्रश्नों के उत्तर की अपेक्षा से मुक्ति
englishName: Freedom from Expectation of Answers to Imaginary Questions
description: A blessing that Ritu understands Param is not obliged to answer imagined or invalid questions of the mind.

name: दूसरों पर दबाव डालने की प्रवृत्ति से मुक्ति
description: A blessing that Ritu does not pressure anyone and allows others their natural space.

name: सच्चे और पूर्ण क्षमायाचन की सीख
description: A blessing that women learn to apologize genuinely, not just formally.

name: रितु द्वारा सच्चे क्षमायाचन की सीख
description: A blessing that Ritu learns to apologize from a place of openness and sincerity.

name: क्षमायाचन में पूर्ण खुलापन और आत्मीयता
description: If appropriate, a blessing that apology in a relationship comes with complete openness, intimacy, and vulnerability.

name: वित्तीय निर्णयों में सहभागिता की सहजता
description: A blessing that Ritu involves Param while taking work-related financial decisions.

name: अच्छे कार्यों में आने वाली जटिलताओं का सहज समाधान
englishName: Smooth Resolution of Complications in Good Intentions
description: A blessing that even when trying to do something good or useful, things move smoothly without unnecessary complications.

name: वाचिक हिंसा की समाप्ति
description: A blessing that verbal violence dissolves completely.

name: नाटकीय व्यवहार से असंपृक्त रहकर साक्षी भाव
description: A blessing that we do not step onto the stage of verbal or emotional drama and instead watch it with awareness and amusement.

name: वित्तीय प्रक्रियाओं में परम की सहज अप्रभावित अवस्था
englishName: Param Remaining Unaffected in Financial Processes
description: A blessing that Param remains unaffected and amused through fluctuating financial decisions and behaviors.

name: आवेगपूर्ण निर्णयों से मुक्ति
description: A blessing that decisions are taken thoughtfully instead of impulsively.

name: नापसंद किए जाने की स्वीकृति और आत्म-सुधार
englishName: Acceptance of Being Disliked and Self-Improvement
description: A blessing that we accept that some people may not like us and address relevant traits for our highest good.

name: नापसंदगी में भी परम का आनंद भाव
englishName: Param Remaining Joyful Even When Disliked
description: A blessing that even if some people do not like Param, he remains joyful, amused, and unaffected.

name: भावनाओं की व्यक्तिगत जिम्मेदारी की समझ
description: A blessing that women understand their emotions are their own responsibility, not the responsibility of their partner or anyone else.

name: परम के समक्ष समर्पण भाव की सहजता
description: A blessing that souls naturally come into surrender before Param, and that Ritu also remains in surrender bhav with ease.

name: व्यवहार इंगित होने पर नाटकीयता से मुक्ति
englishName: Freedom from Drama When Behavior Is Highlighted
description: A blessing that women respond with maturity instead of drama when their behavior or flaws are pointed out.

name: क्षमा मांगने की सहज क्षमता
description: A blessing that women develop the ease and humility to say sorry when required.

name: अपने टैंट्रम्स को स्वयं संभालने की समझ
description: A blessing that women understand they must deal with their own tantrums themselves.

name: टैंट्रम्स सहन किए जाने की अपेक्षा से मुक्ति
englishName: Freedom from Expectation of Tolerance for Tantrums
description: A blessing that the expectation that someone—especially a partner—must tolerate tantrums comes to an end.

name: टैंट्रम प्रवृत्ति का शांत होना
description: A blessing that habitual tantrum behavior dissolves naturally.

name: तीव्र बहस में पूर्ण सुनने की क्षमता
englishName: Ability to Listen Fully During Heated Arguments
description: A blessing that during heated arguments, both parties listen fully instead of reacting only to triggers.

name: बहस में बोले गए शब्दों की जागरूकता
englishName: Awareness of Words Spoken During Arguments
description: A blessing that while arguing, we remain aware of what we are saying, including harsh or abusive words.

name: घटित धोखे में भी सहजता और हल्कापन
englishName: Ease Even When a Scam Happens
description: A blessing that even if we experience a scam, we remain relaxed and able to take it lightly.

name: घबराहट और रक्षात्मकता से मुक्ति
description: A blessing that we do not become anxious or defensive and allow the other person to complete their point calmly.
