name: पूर्व भाव इच्छा भक्षण भवा
englishName: Freedom from desire to relive past emotions
translatedName: The desire to relive a past emotion is dissolved
description: One becomes free from the longing to re-experience emotions or situations from the past.

name: Istraan shradha prakt bhava
description: Devotion and reverence toward the divine feminine awaken within.

name: Istraan purushtav shradha bhav prakt bhava
englishName: Awakening of reverence for divine feminine and masculine
description: A deep reverence arises for both divine feminine and masculine energies.

name: विरह jagrat bhava
description: A longing or separation from divine presence awakens inner bhakti and love.

name: Ichha virudh nirudh bhava
translatedName: No one is forced against their will
description: People stop forcing others—including partners or children—against their own will, especially in sexual or emotional matters.

name: Uttarayan daman Bhava
description: When leaving this body, it will be simple, easy and painless

name: Savyam vedna mukt bhava
description: Freedom from self harming behaviour

name: Sahaj gyan bhava
description: Spontaneous bhava

name: Aatam kaam santushti bhava
description: Especially for women

name: Kin kartavaya vimudh bhava
description: Stupidity mukt

name: Munshi bhava
description: May I think myself as an accountant of divine and thus spending on his behalf.

name: नेकी कर दरिया में डाल bhava
englishName: nk kr dry m dl bhava
description: Create without the need of being seen bhava

name: Paashvik chetna utthan bhava
description: Accept animality shortcomings bhava

name: अत्यंत पीड़ा मुक्त bhava
description: Level and duration of pain is reduced

name: पराधीनता pradhinta mukt bhava
description: Majboori se mukti

name: simran bhav-paar bhav
description: Jaap simran deeksha

name: root remember and connected bhava
description: We remember our source

name: Mrityu smaran bhava
description: A remembrance of death that brings humility, urgency, and clarity to life. It helps us value every moment.

name: Dwandh swikaaratmak bhava
description: A state of acceptance toward life’s paradoxes. Recognizing that light and dark, joy and sorrow, all exist together, and both are divine.

name: Nirasha mukt bhava
description: Freedom from hopelessness. A deep inner faith that something beautiful can still unfold, even in difficult times.

name: Swayam bhod bhava
description: Self-awakening bhava. The inner light of awareness shines by itself without outside triggers or teachers.

name: Sway swikriti bhava
description: Self-acceptance bhava. We lovingly accept ourselves, including our flaws and gifts, without judgement.

name: Sarv prani chetna utthan bhava
description: A collective rising in consciousness for all beings. The entire creation begins to awaken to divine truth.

name: Jyoti ling mahakaal
description: Blessing of Lord Mahakaal in the jyotirlinga form, so that saints remain protected and untouched by negative forces in these cities.

name: Yogasth emerges as mighty culture
description: Yogasth—being established in yoga—emerges not just as a practice but as a powerful new way of living and a cultural movement.

name: Svayam prabhavit bhava
description: Remaining unaffected by the ordinary vibrations of others. A state where one's inner peace remains untouched by external influences.

name: Hans drishti bhava
description: Like a swan that separates milk from water, we gain the wisdom to see truth in every situation and enjoy both union and separation gracefully.

name: Durjan para-vidya dur bhava
description: Let divine wisdom stay away from the wicked. Spiritual knowledge remains protected and inaccessible to those who may misuse it.

name: पवित्र स्नानं
description: A sacred inner and outer cleansing. It symbolizes new life, renewal, and spiritual rebirth.

name: स्वतः ब्रह्मचर्य
description: Natural celibacy. A state where celibacy arises not from suppression, but from deep understanding and inner contentment.

name: Asatya janjal mukt bhava
description: Freedom from the web of lies—no more false advertising, outdated identities, or old energy. A clean, truthful expression of being.

name: Sampurn smarpan for teachers/Gurus bhava
description: A full and heartfelt surrender to one's Guru or teacher, trusting their guidance with devotion and respect.

name: Sampurn smarpan of ritu during intimacy bhava
description: During intimacy, the complete surrender of the feminine flow (ritu). Letting go fully, with trust and love, allowing divine energy to move freely.
englishName: Sampurn smarpan of ritu during intimacy bhava

name: Krida kevlam kulvanti bhava
description: Play the divine game fully, without being attached to the result. A joyful surrender to life’s drama, like a true noble soul.

name: Charamutkarsh icchha mukt bhava
description: Freedom from the obsessive desire for climax in intimacy. A deep, content, and sacred connection beyond physical peak.

name: Sharirum bhavi devo deh bhava
description: The old, impure body is symbolically burnt. A radiant, divine body emerges, prepared to serve higher purpose and light.

name: Sadbudhi nirnayak bhava
description: A state where clear wisdom arises, allowing one—especially women—to make wise and independent decisions in life.

name: Samajh sakon bhava
description: May I understand others deeply, including their pain, emotions, and needs. Cultivating empathy and true connection.

name: Adhuri chah-bhav pruan bhava
description: Blessing to complete the incomplete desires and emotions still waiting in the heart, bringing peace and closure.

name: Gupt var(baat) surakshit bhava
description: Confidential words, secrets, or commitments are protected. This bhava brings trustworthiness and inner security.

name: Kaam (sex) para-vidya bhava
description: Sex as a path of higher knowledge. This bhava transforms physical union into a spiritual journey of awareness and divine connection.

name: Dharam agyan dur bhava
description: Clearing ignorance about true dharma (righteousness). The blessing helps one align with the soul's path, free from dogma or confusion.

name: Divya marg darshan shakti praapt bhava
description: Gaining the divine power to see the right path clearly in life, especially during times of confusion or important choices.
englishName: Divya marg darshan shakti praapt bhava

name: Dand up-shamnam bhava
description: Reducing karmic punishment by 40%. A merciful chance to grow through awareness rather than suffering.

name: Aatm Hanan nirodh bhava
description: Brings an end to self-harming thoughts, habits, or beliefs. Encourages self-love, healing, and inner kindness.

name: Prabhu janat bhava
description: True love for the Divine comes only through understanding. This bhava brings spiritual intimacy through direct experience of the Divine.

name: Special blessings for Ritu for going through all this hardship to motivate me
description: A heartfelt blessing for Ritu, honoring her strength and endurance, which became a source of deep inspiration and transformation.
englishName: Special blessings for Ritu for going through all this hardship to motivate me

name: Dard se darshan bhava
description: From pain, divine realization arises. This bhava helps turn heartbreak into spiritual insight and sweet surrender.

name: Rahu Ketu to plane of peace and happiness
description: The shadow planets Rahu and Ketu no longer disturb the mind. Their energy is now aligned with peace, clarity, and joy.
englishName: Rahu Ketu to plane of peace and happiness

name: Aatam urja kaam mayi bhava
description: Sexual energy is filled with soul-force. Intimacy becomes vibrant, fulfilling, and sacred—energizing body and spirit.

name: Ripus mukti bhava
description: Freedom from inner enemies—lust, anger, greed, lies, and gossip. This bhava brings purification and inner mastery.

name: हर क्षण आनन्दित जीवित bhava
description: Living joyfully in every moment. This bhava reminds us that bliss is available now—not in the future, but here and now, in each breath.

name: Bani guru, guru hai bani Bhava
description: The divine Word is the true Guru. The sacred speech itself becomes a teacher, guiding and awakening the soul.
englishName: Bani guru guru hai bani Bhava

name: ਭਜੁ ਮਨ ਮੇਰੇ ਏਕੋ ਨਾਮ Bhava
description: O my mind, meditate only on the One Name. This bhava centers the soul into divine remembrance and oneness.
englishName: ਭਜ ਮਨ ਮਰ ਏਕ ਨਮ Bhava

name: ਗੁਰ ਬਿਨੁ ਘੋਰੁ ਅੰਧਾਰੁ ਗੁਰੂ ਬਿਨੁ ਸਮਝ ਨ ਆਵੈ Bhava
description: Without the Guru, all is deep darkness. This bhava brings clarity, inner vision, and guidance through Guru's light.
englishName: ਗਰ ਬਨ ਘਰ ਅਧਰ ਗਰ ਬਨ ਸਮਝ ਨ ਆਵ Bhava

name: मेरे साहिब तूं मै माणु निमाणी ॥ अरदासि करी प्रभ अपने आगै सुणि सुणि जीवा तेरी बाणी Bhava
description: My Lord, I am small and You are great. I live by listening to Your sacred words again and again. This bhava cultivates surrender and loving devotion.
englishName: mr shb t m mn nmn  ards kr prbh apn aag sn sn jv tr bn Bhava

name: ऐसे गुर कउ बलि बलि जाईऐ, आपि मुकतु मोहि तारै Bhava
description: I bow again and again to such a Guru, who is liberated and liberates others. This bhava fills the heart with gratitude toward the spiritual teacher.
englishName: ais gr ku bl bl jeeai aap mkt mh tr Bhava

name: Smriti bhava
description: Awakening divine memory—the remembrance of who we truly are beyond body and mind.

name: Satarkta bhava
description: Alertness bhava. Staying watchful and aware of thoughts, actions, and surroundings in a mindful way.

name: Sajagta bhava
description: Readiness and conscious presence. This bhava supports being awake and fully present in every moment.

name: Connect with audience bhava
description: The power to truly connect with people. Whether speaking, teaching, or sharing—this bhava enables deep heart-to-heart resonance.

name: Moh bhakshan bhava
description: Letting go of attachment (moh). This bhava helps dissolve clinginess to people, outcomes, or identities, setting the soul free.

name: Sarvagya savikaarm bhava
description: Total acceptance of all beings. Even when others act foolishly, this bhava holds space for them without judgment or rejection.

name: जा तू मेरै वलि है ता किआ मुहछंदा ॥
description: When You, O Divine, are on my side, what do I need to fear or worry about? This bhava brings deep inner security and surrender.
englishName: j t mr vl h t kaa mhchhd

name: तुधु सभु किछु मैनो सउपिआ जा तेरा बंदा ॥
description: Everything has been entrusted to me by the Divine when I became His devotee. This bhava reflects divine trust and responsibility.
englishName: tdh sbh kchh mn supaa j tr bd

name: लखमी तोटि न आवई खाइ खरचि रहंदा ॥
description: My divine wealth never runs out, no matter how much is used or shared. This bhava brings abundance consciousness and generosity.
englishName: lkhm tt n aavee khi khrch rhd

name: लख चउरासीह मेदनी सभ सेव करंदा ॥
description: Even the 8.4 million life forms serve me when I walk the divine path. This bhava shows alignment with universal harmony and seva.
englishName: lkh chursh mdn sbh sv krd

name: एह वैरी मित्र सभि कीतिआ नह मंगहि मंदा ॥
description: Even enemies become friends; no one wishes me harm. This bhava reflects transformation through divine love and inner purity.
englishName: eh vr mtr sbh ktaa nh mgh md

name: लेखा कोइ न पुछई जा हरि बखसंदा ॥
description: No one questions or audits me, for God is the one who forgives. This bhava brings deep forgiveness and freedom from guilt.
englishName: lkh ki n pchhee j hr bkhsd

name: अनंदु भइआ सुखु पाइआ मिलि गुर गोविंदा ॥
description: Meeting the Guru, I attained peace and joy. This bhava celebrates union with the Guru and the joy it brings to the soul.
englishName: and bhiaa skh piaa ml gr gvd

name: सभे काज सवारिऐ जा तुधु भावंदा ॥७॥
description: When I am pleasing to You, Divine, all my tasks are taken care of. This bhava is about divine grace and effortless success.
englishName: sbh kj svrai j tdh bhvd ७

name: Twin flame sanyog bhava
description: Union with one’s twin flame becomes possible. A soul-level connection aligns for spiritual and emotional companionship.

name: Madhur Milan bhava
description: A sweet and loving reunion energy. This bhava brings emotional harmony and tender coming together of hearts.

name: तेरा भाना मीठा लागे, हरि नाम पदार्थ नानक मांगे bhava
description: Let me feel sweetness in Your will, O Lord. May I only ask for the gift of Your Name. This bhava cultivates surrender and devotion.
englishName: tr bhn mth lg hr nm pdrth nnk mg bhava

name: Satguru Hoye Dayal bhava
description: When the True Guru is kind, grace flows abundantly. This bhava invokes the compassionate presence of the Guru in one’s life.

name: complete श्रद्धा in satguru bhava
description: Total and unwavering faith in the Satguru. This bhava strengthens one’s trust and surrender to the divine teacher.

name: never grieve bhava
description: Freedom from sorrow becomes natural. This bhava dissolves deep inner grief and replaces it with acceptance and peace.

name: know no pain bhava
description: A state where pain—physical, emotional or spiritual—does not disturb the being. This bhava reflects divine detachment and healing.

name: enjoy the Lord’s Love bhava
description: To deeply relish and live in the love of the Divine. This bhava is a reminder to rest in divine affection and bliss.

name: no fear of death bhava
description: Liberation from the fear of death. This bhava allows one to embrace life and death as part of the same divine play.

name: always at peace bhava
description: An ongoing state of calmness and inner silence, no matter the outer situations. This bhava is the fruit of spiritual alignment.

name: nine treasures are obtained bhava
description: Attainment of the Nav-Nidhis (nine treasures), representing material, mental, and spiritual abundance and divine grace.

name: absorbed in the True Lord bhava
description: Total absorption in the presence of the True Lord. This bhava brings spiritual union and complete oneness with Divine Truth.
englishName: absorbed in the True Lord bhava

name: Naya sangat daksh bhava
description: This bhava supports lawyers and legal practitioners in becoming wise, capable, and skillful in guiding society through the path of justice and dharma.

name: Aham swikar bhava
description: This bhava is about acknowledging when we knowingly take stress due to ego. It helps us take responsibility for our inner state and shift toward humility and awareness.

name: महान bhava
description: A personal blessing to recognize and embody greatness—not from pride, but from the inner truth and higher purpose of the soul.

name: Kaam ichha mukt bhava
description: Freedom from lustful desires. This bhava supports inner purity and allows energy to be directed toward higher, creative, or spiritual goals.

name: Madhuram bhava
description: A sweet and loving state of being. This bhava invites gentleness in words, actions, and thoughts, allowing one to become a source of joy for others.

name: Aanandit bhava
description: A natural state of bliss. This bhava brings a deep feeling of inner joy that is not dependent on outer circumstances.

name: Aashirwad vriddhi bhava
description: Blessings grow and multiply. This bhava ensures that the positive energy, grace, and support from the Divine keep increasing in every aspect of life.

name: Spirit guides can pull out bhava
description: This bhava allows your spiritual guides to intervene and pull you out of darkness, confusion, or danger when needed—without needing to call them consciously.
englishName: Spirit guides can pull out bhava

name: Ekoham jaanaat bhava
translatedName: Realization of oneness with the Divine bhava
description: This bhava awakens the realization that 'I am One with the Divine.' It dissolves separation and ego.

name: samanya sanyami bhava
description: This bhava instills everyday discipline and balanced behavior in food, speech, emotions, and desires.

name: कैद मुक्त bhava
description: This bhava removes the inner or outer sense of being trapped, whether in body, mind, or environment.

name: बिना शिकायत भाव के कैद स्वीकार bhava
englishName: Bina shikayat bhaav ke kaid swikaar bhava
translatedName: Acceptance of confinement without complaint bhava
description: This bhava blesses you with peace and grace even in restricted or difficult circumstances, without blame or complaint.

name: रख(रक्षा करो) पिता प्रभ मेरे, मोहे निर्गुण, सब गुन तेरे
englishName: Rakh pita prabh mere, mohe nirgun, sab gun tere
translatedName: Protect me, Father Lord — I am without virtues, all virtues are Yours
description: This bhava is a prayer of humility and surrender, trusting divine protection and acknowledging that all goodness comes from the Lord.

name: गुन गावा नित तेरे, तुझ बिन अवर न जाना मेरे साहिबा
englishName: Gun gawa nit tere, tujh bin avar na jaana mere sahibaa
translatedName: I sing Your glories daily; I know none but You, O my Lord
description: This bhava brings deep devotion and loyalty to the Divine, where the soul is in constant praise and remembrance.

name: O Sutrdhaar, Guardian bhava
description: This bhava invokes the presence of the Divine as the thread-holder (sutradhaar), the one who writes and protects your life’s play.

name: Kaamdev (god of sex) bhava
translatedName: Activation of divine sensuality and attraction bhava
description: This bhava awakens the divine energy of desire, attraction, and sensual beauty through Kaamdev — not as lust, but as sacred energy.

name: प्रसन्न bhava
description: This bhava keeps you cheerful, lighthearted, and internally bright regardless of circumstances.

name: वेदना, पीरा mukt bhava
description: Freedom from pain and suffering. This bhava gently dissolves physical, mental, and emotional pain, bringing relief and lightness.

name: Shashavat parma anand ekakar bhava
description: Merging into eternal supreme bliss. This bhava leads to an experience of oneness with infinite joy and divine peace.

name: क्षण रस प्राप्ति bhava
description: Experiencing the sweet essence of the present moment. This bhava invites full enjoyment of 'now'—free from past or future distractions.

name: Bahut upyogi bhava
description: A personal blessing to become very useful and purposeful in life, making your presence valuable for the world around you.

name: Rajnetik dharam daksh bhava
description: For global leaders and politicians to act with spiritual responsibility. This bhava supports righteous governance rooted in higher wisdom.

name: Rachnatmak bhava
description: Creative expression flows freely. This bhava helps awaken the inner artist, innovator, or builder in you.

name: Romanchit n excitement bhava
description: Feeling thrilled, alive, and spiritually excited. This bhava opens the heart to divine wonder and new possibilities.

name: Swasthya bhava
description: Overall health and vitality. This bhava supports the well-being of the body, mind, and soul.

name: Antar Drishti Bhava
description: Inner vision awakens. Like the third eye opening, this bhava deepens your intuitive perception and spiritual insight.

name: Madhur swapna bhava
description: Receiving sweet, healing, or divine dreams. This bhava brings calm, spiritual connection, and deeper sleep experiences.

name: Prashashan dharam daksh bhava, sadbuddi rakshanrth bhava
audience: for people who manage a city
description: For administrative leaders to manage with wisdom and spiritual values. This bhava protects cities through righteous decision-making.
englishName: Prashashan dharam daksh bhava sadbuddi rakshanrth bhava

name: Bhava bhakshan bhava
description: Consuming or dissolving bitter emotional patterns. This bhava transforms emotional heaviness into lightness and clarity.

name: Vilasita mukt bhava
description: Freedom from indulgence in luxury and excess. This bhava supports simplicity and spiritual contentment.

name: Anand kreerda क्रीर्डा bhava
description: Joyful divine play. This bhava encourages us to engage with life lightly and playfully, as a child of the Divine.

name: Ichha falibhoot bhava
description: Desires manifest with divine timing. This bhava supports inner alignment so that sincere wishes become reality.

name: Abhinay daksh bhava
description: Graceful expression through body and behavior. This bhava enhances your ability to act, present, and communicate effectively.

name: Instrument i.e. Sexual organs, theek bhava
description: Healing and alignment of sexual organs. This bhava restores sacredness, vitality, and health to the reproductive system.
englishName: Instrument ie Sexual organs theek bhava

name: Aatma pehal prathakmicta bhava
description: Prioritizing the soul's voice. This bhava supports choosing inner guidance over ego or external pressure.

name: Khoob money 💰 bhava
description: Abundance of wealth. This bhava invites a strong flow of money and material support into your life with divine ease.

name: Jivan pravaah bhava
description: Go with the flow of life. This bhava helps release resistance and allows grace to carry you forward.

name: Param Anand bhava
description: Experience of supreme bliss. This bhava dissolves inner restlessness and connects you to divine joy.

name: Vyarth utsukta sampat bhava
description: Freedom from useless restlessness and curiosity. This bhava helps the mind stay calm and focused.

name: Aatm Kamal 🪷 viksit bhava
description: The inner lotus of the soul blossoms. This bhava brings spiritual awakening and purity of heart.

name: Star origin activation & soul evolution
description: Awakening of starseed memories and higher soul wisdom. This bhava accelerates soul evolution and galactic remembrance.

name: Poorn roopen Saksham bhava
description: Fully empowered and capable in all aspects. This bhava fills you with inner strength and divine competence.

name: Disha sajagta
description: Awareness of direction. This bhava brings clarity about the right path in life, helping us move with purpose and confidence.

name: Nitya Yauvan bhava
description: Ever-youthful energy. This bhava blesses the body and spirit with freshness, vitality, and timeless beauty.

name: Nav yogini bhava
description: Awakening of the nine Yogini energies. This bhava activates divine feminine powers within for protection, wisdom, and transformation.

name: Maya ankush mukt bhava
description: Freedom from the controlling grip of illusion (maya). This bhava helps the soul see clearly and live freely from inner truth.

name: Kriya Kundalini Yoga
description: The sacred path of energy awakening. This bhava supports safe, powerful inner activation through kriya and kundalini practices.

name: So kyu Bisre Jin Sab Kich Diya bhava
description: Why forget the One who gave us everything? This bhava awakens gratitude and remembrance of the Divine Giver in every moment.
englishName: So kyu Bisre Jin Sab Kich Diya bhava

name: Sanjeevini kriya Shakti level 2 Bhava
description: A deeper level of Sanjeevini energy kriya. This bhava brings enhanced spiritual healing and inner power through breath and motion.

name: Anand Swaroop smriti bhava
description: Remembrance of our true blissful nature. This bhava reminds the soul that it is made of joy, not pain or limitation.

name: Sad ismaran bhava
description: Constant remembrance of noble qualities (sadgun). This bhava helps us stay aligned with purity, humility, and divine virtues.

name: Guru Deeksha Bhava
description: Moving toward the Guru and being open to receiving initiation. This bhava prepares one’s soul to accept divine guidance wholeheartedly.

name: Our attention is aligned with our intention bhava
audience: for people present during our live video
description: A powerful blessing for those present: your focus aligns perfectly with your spiritual goals and soul’s desires.
englishName: Our attention is aligned with our intention bhava

name: Maa Baglamukhi bhava
description: Divine protection and power from Goddess Baglamukhi. This bhava silences negativity and grants deep spiritual strength.

name: Karam mukti Bhava
description: Freedom from binding karmas. This bhava dissolves past burdens and opens a new space of lightness and liberation.

name: Prabhu Milan, Prabhu Prem Bhava
description: Union with the Divine in love. This bhava deepens the heart’s connection with God as a beloved partner — 'Prabhu Preet hum tum siyon jori'.

name: Jealousy mukt bhava
description: Freedom from jealousy. This bhava dissolves the tendency to compare and compete, replacing it with contentment and self-worth.

name: Aham nirlipt bhava
description: Freedom from ego attachment. This bhava helps close companions remain untouched by pride, allowing humility and grace to blossom.

name: Swarth siddhi mukt bhava
description: Releasing selfish intentions. This bhava supports actions that are guided by divine will rather than personal gain.

name: Chittargupt bhava
description: Awareness that all actions are being recorded. This bhava brings responsibility, integrity, and conscious living in every moment.

name: Apeksha, upeksha mukt bhava
description: Freedom from expectations and neglect. This bhava brings emotional balance—neither needing from others, nor feeling ignored.

name: Kaam ichha purn bhava
description: Fulfillment of sacred desires. This bhava allows intimate or soulful longing to be fulfilled in divine alignment and harmony.

name: Pehlan maran kabool bhava
description: Surrender before resistance. This bhava reflects deep devotion—'I accept inner death before resisting the divine'. It brings humility and readiness.

name: Mera mujh main kuch nahi, Jo kuch hai so tera bhava
description: Nothing is mine, everything belongs to You. This bhava dissolves personal ego and offers everything back to the Divine with love.
englishName: Mera mujh main kuch nahi Jo kuch hai so tera bhava

name: Saans saans Simro gobind bhava
description: With every breath, I remember the Divine. This bhava makes remembrance of God a natural, continuous experience throughout daily life.

name: Words of Maha Guru Triggers awakening of Listeners bhava
description: The words of the Maha Guru deeply touch the soul and awaken inner light in those who listen with an open heart.
englishName: Words of Maha Guru Triggers awakening of Listeners bhava

name: Kaal parivartan bhava
description: This too shall pass. A reminder that time brings change, and even difficult situations are temporary and part of divine unfolding.

name: Swah Upkaar sushobhit, sway sanskaran bhava
description: Beautifying the self through spiritual service and self-culturing. This bhava prioritizes spiritual use of time, money, and energy.
englishName: Swah Upkaar sushobhit sway sanskaran bhava

name: Intezaar mukt bhava
description: Freedom from waiting. This bhava allows you to live in presence without craving or constantly expecting outcomes.

name: Kaal yatra bhava
description: Journey through time with awareness. This bhava connects you to the spiritual dimension of time and your evolution across it.

name: Aatam bal prabal ichha
description: Strong willpower supported by soul-force. This bhava gives inner strength to fulfill what is aligned with your divine purpose.

name: Istran gunn praishudh bhava
description: Purification of feminine qualities. This bhava refines divine feminine traits like softness, intuition, and nurturing with spiritual clarity.

name: Ati jigyasa nirudh bhava
description: Curiosity is balanced and not excessive. This bhava calms the restless need to know and supports inner silence and trust.

name: शुद्ध मात्रत्व प्रेम bhava
